use_cases: Displaying status indicators or labels in dashboards and interfaces
Tagging products or content with categorical information
Creating visual badges for pricing tiers or subscription types
Showing user roles, permissions, or account status
Indicating completion states or progress in workflows
ai_summary: A versatile badge component with 14+ color variants including solid, subtle, gradient, and pill styles. Supports three sizes (sm, md, lg) with optional icons and can render as a clickable link. Perfect for displaying tags, status indicators, labels, and categorical information across various SaaS and e-commerce applications.
